channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Litter strewn all over the pavement, 25th March
item.description:
Litter strewn all over the pavement since bin collection on Tues 24/03

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bethel Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Problem not resolved, 25th March
item.description:
Stairs and lift have not been cleaned today but you state it’s been resolved, no cleaner in sight all day today so it NOT RESOLVED
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lancaster Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drug paraphernalia and dog waste, 25th March
item.description:
This is not resolved has you reported! At 3pm it’s still there but you said it was resolved at 8.45am same day So clearly it’s not resolved and needs to be sorted in case children touch

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lancaster Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo, 25th March
item.description:
294 Crystal Palace road SE22

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 294, Crystal Palace Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dirty road, 25th March
item.description:
Can you please explain why Springfield road welling has only been cleaned/ swept up to number 22 ???? This includes the kerb side as well ??? Most of the time this road looks a total mess, what with wheelie bins left outside No. 29 and 31 which causes an obstruction, I am surprised the cleaners haven’t complained as I saw him having to go out into the road to get passed with his cleaning trolley!!!!! We try and keep our pavement free from rubbish, it is annoying when we go out and see that only half the rd has been cleaned by bexley WHY!!!!!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Springfield Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 25th March
item.description:
A dozen pallets dumped on Ravensdale Road from place of worship opposite

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priestley Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and flytipping, 25th March
item.description:
Baffling why this request keeps being marked as fixed. All of the rubbish mentioned in the previous two requests is still there. Please stop closing the requests without resolving the problem.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Faversham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped recycling bags, 25th March
item.description:
I reported this on 23 March. The reference was 9169642. I received an email today to tell me that the problem has been resolved. It has not. The bags are still there.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victorian Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Recycling bin not emptied in a fortnight, 25th March
item.description:
Our recycling has not been collected for over two weeks, with at least two consecutive missed collections. This is unacceptable, particularly given the council’s recent messaging that residents need to do more.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eastway, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Offensive graffiti in the rubbish chute handle on the first floor in St Vincent House, 25th March
item.description:
Offensive graffiti in the rubbish chute handle on the first floor in St Vincent House

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fendall Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large amount of construction debris and rubbish left on the pavement at the bottom end of the parking bays in Quince Road, 25th March
item.description:
A large amount of construction debris, including rubbish bags, bricks, and assorted rubbish has been left on the pavement at the bottom of the parking bays at the end of Quince Road, close to Morden Mount School.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Quince Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Build up of weeds & rubbish, 25th March
item.description:
Weeds & rubbish have been building up including broken glass - dangerous as many small children use this path daily for nurseries & schools

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southend Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Barriers left behind during work, 25th March
item.description:
Barriers for building work left behind and causing obstruction, if this could be raised to be picked up JW
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Homesdale Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Barriers, 25th March
item.description:
2 yellow barriers left from works that took place in February. Please can these be removed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lulworth Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street cleansing request - Bellevue road, 25th March
item.description:
Cleansing request for Bellevue road. There is alot of dog fouling and general litter that hasn't been cleaned since before Christmas and the litter is building up. Could this be cleared?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellevue Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car driving on Vouncil land onto pavement, 25th March
item.description:
Firstly a cemented bollard has come out of the ground near fish and chip shop damaged by hgv! Two cars parked on Council ground outside the parade of shops near fish and chip shop ( Not allowed to park there as Vouncil ground). A vehicle was driving on concourse and decided to cut across the pedestrian footpath see pic. Councilor O’Neil advised I contact you! There should be bollards so vehicles cannot cut across!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Lane, Welling, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gulley floods when it rains, 25th March
item.description:
Rain water gulley blocked and floods when it rains
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chase Side, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 25th March
item.description:
A neighbour knocked on my door complaining about some dumped rubbish , whilst there an African man came up with a bag to add to the pile he confirmed he was from number 26 Kent Road as per the address label in the photo , he said he didn’t know he wasn’t allowed to put rubbish out as it always gets taken,I believe he has been prolific serial flytipper in this immediate area for a couple of years but always did it at night so no one knows who it was , please take action against this individual as the we are all fed up of it, thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Kent Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fence collapsing onto public path due to building materials, 25th March
item.description:
Lots of heavy items/materials leaning against the fence which is falling into the public footpath. Not safe to walk by incase it collapses. Could cause serious injury if it fell onto a child or pushchair.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Crayford Road, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green wheelie bin outside Premier Lodge/3 Redbourne Avenue, 25th March
item.description:
Abandoned green garden wheelie bin on pavement for last 3 weeks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Redbourne Avenue, Church End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
